item.title: GENIUS Act takes effect July 18, requiring stablecoin issuers to meet federal reserve, audit, and AML standards
EU MiCA final deadline strips registration from ~80% of crypto firms; only 230 of 3,000+ achieve full licensing
BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, and Morgan Stanley join UK government's 54-firm tokenization taskforce
SEC plans three crypto rulemaking proposals in July covering token offerings, custody, and trading venues
Morgan Stanley receives conditional OCC approval to launch national trust bank for digital asset custody and staking
CLARITY Act Senate vote approaches; passage requires seven Democratic crossover votes
Australia's Travel Rule takes effect July 1, mandating identity verification on all regulated crypto exchange transfers
OCC formally authorizes US national banks to provide digital asset custody services
JPMorgan prepares crypto collateral lending program following GENIUS Act passage
Ostium loses $18M to oracle exploit on July 15 as attacker submits falsified price data to drain liquidity vault
DTCC schedules October 2026 launch for tokenized-securities platform following limited July pilot trades
Summer.fi halts Lazy Summer vaults after $6M flash-loan exploit on July 6
Ethical hackers patch Aptos blockchain flaw that could have put $70B in assets at systemic risk
